messages.text: Hi, I have water seepage on my basement wall and my master bathroom WC is leaking.
Can you share your address and whether you need a site check first?
Address is 11E Mount Sinai Lane #01-21 Singapore 277054. I think site visit needed because not sure where seepage comes from.
Understood. Do you want us to prepare a quote after inspection?
Yes please. If possible arrange this week. It is a bit urgent.
